creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
sahil       2011-02-20 06:21:36 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    mail/postfix-current Makefile distinfo pkg-plist 
    mail/postfix-current/files pkg-install.in 
  Log:
  Update to 2.9-20110219, update CONFLICTS, alphabetically
  sort packing list, and tweak PKGNAMESUFFIX when INST_BASE
  is defined.  Also, sync OPTIONS with mail/postfix to warn
  users trying to build this port with unsupported options.
  
  Finally, modify pkg-install script to check if Postfix is
  already enabled in mailer.conf.
  
  PR:             ports/154495
  Submitted by:   ohauer
  Approved by:    maintainer timeout
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.251     +31 -8     ports/mail/postfix-current/Makefile
  1.185     +2 -2      ports/mail/postfix-current/distinfo
  1.2       +21 -11    ports/mail/postfix-current/files/pkg-install.in
  1.64      +18 -16    ports/mail/postfix-current/pkg-plist
